#BTC has broken out

Don't get shaken out

$BTC #Crypto #Bitcoin https://t.co/TOSMwy1GUq

A whale deposited 1,750 $BTC ($48M) to #Binance ~30 mins ago.

The whale deposited 5,791 $BTC ($163M) on April 21, after that the price of $BTC dropped nearly 3% in 5 hours.

Maybe 1,750 $BTC won't be sold, maybe it will.

In any case, keep

Delinquency rates are beginning to rise again, now at 2.6% nationally.

However, the sharp drop in student loan delinquency came as student loan payments were halted.

This summer, payments will resume for the first time since the pandemic.
